alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions in strategy and operations leadership; built and scaled global commercial operations teams and transformation programs with cross-functional stakeholder coordination
alignments.job_requirement: Lead and grow a team of FDE delivering production systems with frontier models

alignments.candidate_evidence: Demonstrated ownership of complex transformation programs at scale with cross-functional coordination, process design, and execution excellence; directs LLM coding agents to build production systems and owns evaluation methodology and calibration
alignments.job_requirement: Own end-to-end delivery outcomes through clarity, speed, tight coordination, and technical quality

alignments.candidate_evidence: Direct experience translating commercial operations into scalable systems, processes, and playbooks; designs and directs LLM tooling solutions that inform strategy and execution
alignments.job_requirement: Codify what works into tools, playbooks, and roadmap inputs that create leverage

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight-year track record of translating operational insights and customer/partner feedback into product strategy and roadmap influence at Google; manages cross-functional partnerships with product and research
alignments.job_requirement: Translate field experience into sharp, actionable feedback for Product and Research

alignments.candidate_evidence: Python basic and actively learning (data-analysis/pandas); proficient in SQL, BigQuery querying, and owns AI agentic tooling that directs production system builds; no stated Javascript or backend development experience
alignments.job_requirement: Write and review production-grade code across frontend and backend using Javascript or Python

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google in strategy and operations leadership with two promotions; no stated native FDE or customer-facing engineer management background; product experience from ownership and transformation rather than engineering PM
alignments.job_requirement: 8+ years of engineering or technical delivery experience, including 2+ years managing high-performing FDE or customer-facing engineers

gaps.gap: No native FDE or field-engineering team management experience; background is strategy, operations, and transformation rather than direct engineering-team leadership
gaps.mitigation: Eight years of cross-functional leadership, team scaling, and high-pressure delivery at Google; FDE management skillset (clarity under pressure, technical judgment, field signal translation) is transferable from large-scale operations; hiring and feedback scaffolding are learnable with mentorship

gaps.gap: Limited production code-writing depth; Python is basic-level actively learning, no Javascript stated, and no native backend/frontend development experience
gaps.mitigation: Role emphasizes business and deployment value, team leadership, and field signal over hands-on coding; candidate's AI agentic tooling direction and technical architecture exposure mitigate the gap partially, but code review rigor and technical depth will require ramp

gaps.gap: No explicit consulting brand or classic customer-facing technical delivery background; experience is internal operations and transformation
gaps.mitigation: Cross-functional stakeholder management, ambiguity navigation, and delivery excellence are demonstrated at scale; customer-engagement mechanics are learnable; domain expertise in frontier AI is absent but learnable

gaps.gap: Visa status and relocation feasibility to London not stated
gaps.mitigation: OpenAI offers relocation assistance; candidate language profile includes native German and professional English; no disqualifying visa constraint evident from profile

output.level_rationale: Role specifies 8+ years technical-delivery experience with 2+ years managing high-performing FDE, team growth ownership, end-to-end delivery accountability, and influence on product/research roadmap. Reporting relationship and company scale (OpenAI, frontier AI context) signal senior leadership scope. This is a manager-of-managers (or equivalent team-scaling) role with customer-facing stakes and cross-functional influence, positioning it at L6 equivalent.
output.summary: Candidate brings eight years of Google strategy-and-operations leadership with proven team scaling, cross-functional delivery, and transformation execution under pressure. Role family fit is moderate-to-strong as an approved-stretch (implementation-heavy AI transformation with business problem-solving and stakeholder management focus); however, the role is L6 and requires native FDE or field-engineering team management, which is not in the candidate's profile. Core gaps are engineering-team leadership experience and production code depth (Python basic-level, no Javascript); these are significant but partially mitigatable through transferable delivery leadership and AI tooling background. Confidence in alignment is moderate; recommend stretch for owner consideration given demonstrated execution excellence and learnable domain context.
uncertainties: Candidate's FDE or customer-facing field engineering leadership experience not explicitly stated; risk of underestimating relevant prior exposure
Depth and scope of AI agentic tooling direction not fully detailed; impact on technical code-review readiness unclear
Visa eligibility and willingness to relocate to London not stated; relocation assistance may mitigate but should be confirmed
OpenAI stage, team size, and onboarding/mentorship model not specified in JD; affects ramp risk for first-time FDE leader
